title: Sarothra aphylla
taxonomy: Sarothra aphylla is a species of tree, and based on available information, it belongs to the family Sarothra, which is part of the order Malpighiales. Within the Malpighiales order, Sarothra aphylla is further classified as a member of the family Euphorbiaceae. The exact classification of Sarothra aphylla is still being researched and may be subject to change as new information becomes available. The genus Sarothra is a monotypic genus, consisting only of the species Sarothra aphylla. Further classification is also provided by its classification as a member of the family Euphorbiaceae and the order Malpighiales.
